def positive_write_without_buffering_in_loop():
    rule_id = "write_without_buffering_in_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Repeated writes inside loops with no visible buffering or batching."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
